# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: "*"
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      proxy:
        kind: SERVER
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          route_config:
            validate_clusters: false
            virtual_hosts:
              - name: "*"
                domains: ["*"]
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/"
                    route:
                      cluster: service_name
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              typed_config: {}
          stat_prefix: ingress
          access_log:
            - format: JSON
              json_format:
                type: structured
                fields:
                  - name: "@timestamp"
                    type: TIMESTAMP
                  - name: "request.method"
                    type: STRING
                  - name: "request.path"
                    type: STRING
                  - name: "response.code"
                    type: INT
          use_remote_address: true
          generate_request_id: false
          forward_client_cert_details: SANITIZE
          set_current_client_cert_details:
            subject: false
            san: true
            dns: true
            uri: false
            email: false
            ip: false
